free_text: Elastic and Inelastic Scattering of 178 MeV Protons
Targets of 80 mg/cm2, enriched to 99.9% in 58Ni
The scattered protons were momentum analyzed
in a magnetic spectrometer and detected by a
16-channel hodoscope in the measurements of the
The polarization measurements were made by means of a
polarimeter with carbon as the second scatterer.
